title: Hanging Plants
description: Hanging plants bring freshness to living rooms or balconies. They can be easily styled with small hanging pots. This method efficiently utilizes vertical space.

title: Succulent Shelf
description: Small succulents on a shelf make the room lively. They can be placed in small pots or glass jars. They require minimal maintenance and look attractive.

title: Corner Greenery
description: Placing a large leafy plant in an empty corner creates a cozy feel. Floor-standing pots can be used. It beautifully fills up empty spaces.

title: Plant Wall
description: Wall-mounted vertical gardens or shelves can be used for wall décor. The room feels fresh and lively. This is an efficient use of wall space.

title: Tabletop Mini Garden
description: Placing small plants on tables or counters enhances dining or work areas. It brings a natural touch. Different sizes and types of plants can be mixed.

title: Bathroom Plants
description: Humidity-loving plants in the bathroom bring freshness. Hanging or shelf-mounted pots can be used. Provides greenery even in small spaces.

title: Window Ledge Plants
description: Placing small plants on window ledges or sills ensures they get sunlight. The room becomes brighter, and the plants thrive. Regular dusting keeps them healthy.

title: Bookshelf Greenery
description: Small plants on bookshelves or cupboards enhance reading or study spaces. Trailing plants increase visual appeal. Regular watering is necessary.

title: Entryway Plants
description: Placing plants near entryways or doorways creates a welcoming feel. Floor plants make a great first impression. Ensure they receive proper sunlight.
